objectives.description: Cross-check mechanism line ranges against current dotfiles.nix
Stage only the two touched files

deviations.description: Cross-check mechanism descriptions against current dotfiles.nix line ranges
deviations.reason: Phase 4's header-comment insertion shifted all subsequent line numbers in dotfiles.nix by +2 versus the plan's original estimates (19-40/57, 42-49, 59-68). Verification caught this; README.md citations were corrected to the actual current ranges (21-42/59, 45-51, 61-70) before finalizing.
deviations.annotation: *(completed: corrected README citations to verified current ranges)*
